content.rule: Use when a page or drawer contains primary actions that must remain available during scrolling.
Use when users complete steppers or multi-field forms.
Use when the action affects entire page/drawer/form state.
Must contain exactly one primary action.
Max 3 buttons. More actions increase the cognitive load.
Use clear verbs describing the OUTCOME: Save, Update, Create, Confirm, Submit, Cancel, Delete, Continue.
Label terminology: Back, Next, Submit (final step).
Do not mix: Continue and Next, Finish and Submit.
